title: Crypto Tax Exporter
body: Export a complete CSV of all ERC-20 transfers and transactions with USD cost basis for tax reporting — Koinly/CoinTracker compatible.

title: ERC-20 Transfer History
body: Fetch full ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet, optionally filtered by token contract.

title: Historical Portfolio Value
body: 30-day rolling historical portfolio value with open/close/high/low per token per day â€” build P&L charts, portfolio performance dashboards, and DeFi fund trackers.

title: Historical Token Holdings
body: Snapshot of every ERC-20 token balance and USD value at any past date — foundational chains only.

title: Multi-Wallet Portfolio Aggregator
body: Enter multiple wallet addresses and see combined token balances, total net worth, and unified transaction feed — your whole onchain life in one view.

title: Native Token Balance
body: Lightweight check for the native token balance (ETH, MATIC, BNB, etc.) of any wallet across any chain.

title: Net Worth Calculator
body: Calculate total wallet net worth across all EVM and non-EVM chains instantly.

title: Portfolio History
body: 30-day historical portfolio value over time â€” asset-by-asset breakdown per day.

title: Solana Staking Snapshot
body: Query a Solana wallet's complete staking picture: native stake accounts (active, activating, deactivating, inactive) pulled from the on-chain stake program, plus liquid staking positions in mSOL (Marinade), jitoSOL (Jito), bSOL (Sanctum), and stSOL (Lido). Returns stake amount in SOL, activation epoch, estimated APY, and claimable rewards for each position — build a staking dashboard, rewards calculator, or unstaking automation agent in one view.

title: Solana Transaction History
body: Fetch paginated Solana transaction history via `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/` — each transaction is decoded with the top-level program name (Jupiter, Raydium, System, Token, etc.), SOL fee paid, success/fail status, block time, and a human-readable summary. Paginate with `page` and `page-size` params. Build a complete Solana activity feed or trading journal without ever parsing raw instruction data.

title: Solana Wallet Age & Activity
body: Use `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/?page-size=1&sort=asc` to find the wallet's first-ever transaction (creation date), then the summary endpoint for total tx count and unique programs interacted with. Returns: first tx date, total lifetime transaction count, top 5 most-called programs, and days since last activity — foundational data for Solana wallet scoring, sybil detection, onchain identity badges, and airdrop eligibility checks.

title: Solana Wallet Balances
body: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/balances_v2/` with your GoldRush API key to retrieve every SPL token held — including name, symbol, logo URI, raw balance, decimals, current USD price, and total USD value per token. Handles associated token accounts (ATAs) automatically with no manual derivation. Add `nft=false` to filter out NFTs and return pure fungible token holdings. Build a full Solana portfolio UI in under 50 lines of TypeScript.

title: Transaction History
body: Paginated, decoded transaction history with logs for any wallet or contract address.

title: Wallet Activity Feed
body: Stream live wallet events and transaction activity across any supported chain.

title: Wallet Age & Summary
body: Get first and last transaction date, total transaction count, and gas spent for any wallet â€” the foundation for wallet age verification and on-chain identity.

title: Wallet Balances Skill
body: Fetch token balances and portfolio state for any wallet across 100+ chains.

title: Wallet P&L Tracker
body: Unrealized P&L for every token in a wallet — shows entry price, current price, and total gain/loss per position.
